name: CreateAccessorInput
description: CreateAccessorInput schema from Amazon Managed Blockchain API

allOf.description: This is a unique, case-sensitive identifier that you provide to ensure the idempotency of the operation. An idempotent operation completes no more than once. This identifier is required only if you make a service request directly using an HTTP client. It is generated automatically if you use an Amazon Web Services SDK or the Amazon Web Services CLI.

The type of accessor.

Currently, accessor type is restricted to BILLING_TOKEN.

Tags to assign to the Accessor.

Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. You can specify multiple key-value pairs in a single request with an overall maximum of 50 tags allowed per resource.

For more information about tags, see Tagging Resources in the Amazon Managed Blockchain Ethereum Developer Guide, or Tagging Resources in the Amazon Managed Blockchain Hyperledger Fabric Developer Guide.
